news.title:
Happiest Minds raises FY27 growth forecast to 12.5%, citing AI strategy momentum.
Strong demand across various sectors supports the revised growth forecast.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds raises FY27 growth forecast to 12.5%, citing AI strategy momentum.

news.title:
Happiest Minds Technologies announces participation in Bharat Connect Conference on March 9, 2026.
The group meeting titled 'Rising Stars' will be held virtually in Bengaluru.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds Technologies announces participation in Bharat Connect Conference on March 9, 2026.

news.title:
Happiest Minds' Dec 2025 net sales grew 15.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 432.7 crore, while net profit fell 51.1% to Rs 14 crore.
EBITDA rose 4% to Rs 76.2 crore; EPS dropped to Rs 0.93 from Rs 1.91. Shares closed at Rs 377.05 on Feb 19, 2026.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds' Dec 2025 net sales grew 15.9% Y-o-Y to Rs 432.7 crore, while net profit fell 51.1% to Rs 14 crore.
EBITDA rose 4% to Rs 76.2 crore; EPS dropped to Rs 0.93 from Rs 1.91. Shares closed at Rs 377.05 on Feb 19, 2026.

news.title:
NCLT approved the amalgamation scheme for Happiest Minds Technologies.
Aureustech Systems Pvt Ltd will merge into Happiest Minds under the scheme.
news.summary:
NCLT approved the amalgamation scheme for Happiest Minds Technologies.
Aureustech Systems Pvt Ltd will merge into Happiest Minds under the scheme.

news.title:
Happiest Minds adopts revenue sharing and outcome-based agreements.
This shift addresses AI-driven changes in IT pricing models.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds adopts revenue sharing and outcome-based agreements.
This shift addresses AI-driven changes in IT pricing models.

news.title:
Happiest Minds shares rose over 4% after CEO hinted at AI partnership.
Shares now up 2%, trading at ₹393, 46% below 52-week high of ₹735.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds shares rose over 4% after CEO hinted at AI partnership.

news.title:
Happiest Minds Technologies' quality grade downgraded from excellent to good due to fundamental shifts.
Key metrics like ROE, ROCE, debt levels, and growth consistency analyzed for investor implications.

news.title:
Happiest Minds unveils 11 strategic initiatives for AI-first transformation.
The move aims to expand its market and accelerate growth with GenAI adoption.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds unveils 11 strategic initiatives for AI-first transformation.

news.title:
Happiest Minds reports a decline in PAT due to an exceptional loss.
The company unveils an ambitious AI and GenAI strategy for future growth.
news.summary:

news.title:
Happiest Minds' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹850M from ₹765M QoQ, reflecting growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.5% from 13.3% QoQ, indicating stronger profitability.
news.summary:
Happiest Minds' Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹850M from ₹765M QoQ, reflecting growth.
EBITDA margin improved to 14.5% from 13.3% QoQ, indicating stronger profitability.

news.title:
Happiest Minds released Q3 FY26 earnings presentation on Feb 9, 2026.
Highlights include AI-driven advances, client case studies, and operational insights.
news.summary:

news.title:
Happiest Minds confirmed timely interest payment of Rs. 88.2L on NCDs.
Due date fell on non-business day; payment made on Feb 9, 2026, next business day.
news.summary:

news.title:
Happiest Minds partners with IBSFintech to improve business treasury operations.
It will act as a reseller and system integration partner for IBSFintech's platform.

news.title:
Happiest Minds' Chairman Ashok Soota considers partial stake sale, valued at Rs 1,980 crore.
Soota holds over 32% directly and 40% through promoter holdings in the IT firm.

The in-person group meeting is scheduled for May 13, 2026, in Mumbai.

news.title:
Happiest Minds launches 'AI First, Agile Always' strategy to integrate AI into business.
They are developing 32 AI use cases targeting healthcare, edtech, retail, and hi-tech sectors.

news.title:
Happiest Minds Technologies received CARE A1+ rating for Rs 5 crore short-term bank facilities.
CARE reaffirmed AA- Stable rating for Rs 80 crore NCDs and Rs 412.98 crore long-term facilities.
